title: Control structures should use curly braces
description: Control structures should use curly braces. While not technically incorrect, the omission of curly braces can be misleading and may lead to the introduction of errors during maintenance. The rule raises an issue when a control structure has no curly braces.
recommendation: Add curly braces to all control structures for better readability and maintainability.

checks.message: If statement should use curly braces for better readability and maintainability.
For statement should use curly braces for better readability and maintainability.
While statement should use curly braces for better readability and maintainability.
Else statement should use curly braces for better readability and maintainability.
